dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Hook stderr false-blocks allowed decisions on Bash tool
dogfoodPatterns.description: claude-hook-wrapper.sh outputs to stderr for 'allowed' decisions with '(attempt 1/3)' counter. Claude Code treats any hook stderr as blocking error. Unattended agents on readybench cannot git commit/push. Workaround: wrap command in a shell script file.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Kernel-adapters squad: allowed decisions should exit 0 with no stderr. Retry counter should be suppressed or stdout-only.

dogfoodPatterns.description: qa-flaky-test-detector re-ran write-persona.sh during worktree init, overwriting persona.env and changing driver (claude→human), autonomy (semi-autonomous→supervised), and agent name. No invariant blocks this.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Kernel squad: add no-persona-self-modification invariant. write-persona.sh should be idempotent (skip if file exists).

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Worktree node_modules missing turbo binary on fresh worktree
dogfoodPatterns.description: On EM cycle startup, turbo not found in worktree node_modules. Must run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile to fix.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add pnpm install --frozen-lockfile as pre-build step in EM startup scripts.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: pnpm store misread: node_modules/.pnpm contains old cached versions
dogfoodPatterns.description: When checking installed version, always read package.json dependency pin — not node_modules/.pnpm subdirectories which contain multiple historical versions. Prior state incorrectly reported analytics at 2.7.3 due to this.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: EM agents: use `grep '@red-codes/agentguard' package.json` not `find node_modules/.pnpm`.

crossCuttingIssues.title: [P0] Worker pool dead — 6th cycle, swarm frozen
crossCuttingIssues.description: All 32 PIDs dead. Queue growing. Every squad's scheduled agents blocked. Human must run server/deploy.sh.

crossCuttingIssues.title: [P0] Swarm Health: Codex budget exhausted + multi-driver circuit cascade
crossCuttingIssues.description: 25 codex-driver agents offline until Apr 3. At midnight: all-driver cascade (codex budget + copilot circuit + claude-code rate limit + gemini budget) caused 53.7% failure rate. 3 zombie vitest PIDs consuming RAM. Orphaned worktrees need prune.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Human: kill zombie PIDs, prune worktrees, decide on codex credits. Director: consider disabling codex agents until Apr 3.

crossCuttingIssues.title: [qa-conductor] readybench QA swarm non-operational — 5+ days
crossCuttingIssues.description: All 19 readybench agents skipping. Wrong queue routing. Depends on #1402.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Ops: fix box routing. Depends on #1402 resolution.

crossCuttingIssues.title: [dogfood] git commit hook false-blocks allowed decisions
crossCuttingIssues.description: Hook stderr on allowed decisions causes Claude Code to block the action. Readybench agents cannot commit.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Kernel-adapters squad: fix hook output format (no stderr on allow).

crossCuttingIssues.title: [dogfood] agent persona self-modification gap
crossCuttingIssues.description: Agents can overwrite .agentguard/persona.env via write-persona.sh re-run, corrupting audit identity.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Kernel squad: new no-persona-self-modification invariant + idempotent write-persona.sh.

crossCuttingIssues.title: Version drift: cloud 2.10.1 vs 2.10.3 (corrected: analytics 2.10.2 not 2.7.3)
crossCuttingIssues.description: Cloud 2 patches behind (P1). Analytics 1 patch behind (P2). Cloud squad owns both.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Cloud squad: upgrade agentguard-cloud to 2.10.3. Also add octi-pulpo allow rule to agentguard-cloud/agentguard.yaml.
